overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The scene features wet reflective streets, towering buildings covered in neon advertisements, futuristic vehicles, and scattered pedestrians in a dense urban environment reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with Watson Studios building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement past the Watson Studios building, observing the neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera down the street

entered.detail: large red building with prominent yellow neon 'WATSON STUDIOS' signage
tall pedestrian crossing signal with illuminated walk symbol
tall building covered in bright pink and blue neon advertisements
rain-soaked asphalt reflecting neon lights in red and yellow hues

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the Watson Studios building dominating the right side. Neon billboards illuminate the left side of the street while the camera walks forward over reflective wet pavement. A pedestrian signal box stands on the left sidewalk as scattered pedestrians walk in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street corridor with green railings

events.description: passing the Watson Studios building and entering the main street corridor with green railings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street alongside green metal railings, approaching the distant DR sign

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with red taillights driving past on the left side of the street

entered.detail: green metal railing running along the left edge of the pedestrian walkway
large blue neon 'DR' sign visible in the distance between buildings
modern glass skyscraper with illuminated windows rising on the left

segments.scene_description: Having passed the Watson Studios building, the scene opens into a wider street corridor lined with green metal railings on the left. A tall glass building rises on the left while the camera approaches a distant blue neon DR sign. Vehicles with glowing taillights pass by on the left as the wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed street under overpass with dense digital billboards

events.description: entering the shadow of an overpass structure, reducing ambient light and emphasizing neon glow

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass while observing the large digital billboards on the right wall

entered.detail: elevated highway or walkway structure spanning across the street ahead
massive curved digital screen on the right building facade displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The street becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches and passes under an overpass structure. Large digital billboards cover the right building facade, displaying vibrant advertisements that illuminate the wet pavement. The ambient light dims under the overpass while neon signs become more prominent, and the green railing continues along the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with political billboard and commercial signs

events.description: emerging from under the overpass and approaching the intersection with the Vote billboard visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection while passing the Watson Life neon sign, observing the Vote billboard ahead

notable_agents.action: person with red hair walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large billboard displaying 'VOTE' text with political messaging suspended over the street
bright pink neon sign reading 'WATSON LIFE' on the right building facade
widening of the street into a crosswalk intersection with traffic signals visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass shadow, the scene opens into a wider intersection approach dominated by a large 'VOTE' billboard suspended overhead. The bright pink 'WATSON LIFE' neon sign illuminates the right side of the street. The camera continues walking toward the crosswalk as pedestrians walk ahead and vehicles move along the left side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from a narrow studio-lined street into a wide, neon-drenched intersection. It begins by moving past the Watson Studios building over reflective wet pavement, with neon billboards and a pedestrian signal box illuminating the left sidewalk. As the camera advances, the view opens into a wider corridor lined with green metal railings and a tall glass building, passing glowing vehicle taillights and a distant blue neon sign. The environment then becomes more enclosed as the camera glides under the shadow of an overpass, where vibrant digital billboards on the right cast intense light across the damp ground. Finally, the scene emerges from the darkness into a bright intersection approach dominated by a suspended VOTE billboard and a pink WATSON LIFE sign as the camera heads toward a busy crosswalk.
